description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux Builds that runs on push to master and github_actions branches and on pull requests to master. Use a ubuntu-20.04 job matrix to build Godot with different float precision settings. For each build, clone the Godot repository and a module, configure dependencies, load and use a scons cache, set up Python 3.x, install scons, and compile the project with specific flags. Upload the resulting binaries as artifacts.
